preamble: The voiced alveolar flap /ɾ/ can undergo a phonetic transformation to a voiced velar fricative /ɣ/. This shift involves a change in the place of articulation from alveolar to velar, and a change in the manner of articulation from a flap to a fricative.
sources: Blanc, H. (1964). Communal dialects in Baghdad. Harvard University Press.
